futureVision.heading: Journey Highlights
futureVision.description: These categories are now managed fully from the backend!
futureVision.futureDescription: Driving dynamic visual architectures across global operations networks.

highlights.title: Childhood
highlights.desc: Early fascination with computers, dismantling old radios and writing basic HTML on a Windows 95 machine.

highlights.title: Career Beginning
highlights.desc: Started as a junior developer in a local agency, learning the ropes of production-level code and client management.

highlights.title: First Brand Collab
highlights.desc: Partnering with a major tech hardware brand to produce a series of educational videos, marking the first sponsorship.

highlights.title: Social Media Journey
highlights.desc: From 0 to 2.5 Million subscribers, navigating algorithm changes, burnout, and discovering a unique educational voice.

highlights.title: Major Milestones
highlights.desc: Reaching 100K subscribers, speaking at TEDx, and launching the first independent tech bootcamp.

highlights.title: Biggest Challenges
highlights.desc: Balancing a demanding senior architect role while growing a YouTube channel, and overcoming imposter syndrome.

highlights.title: Success Stories
highlights.desc: Helping thousands of students land roles at Fortune 500 companies through free content and accessible courses.

highlights.title: Future Vision
highlights.desc: Building a decentralized, globally accessible university-grade tech education platform for the next generation.

highlights.title: New AI Era (Dynamic)
highlights.desc: Just added this via Admin! Integrating state-of-the-art AI tooling and LLM workflows into our ecosystem.
